examples: Or tea. The wire-frame glasses balanced crookedly on his face.
The black guy pitifully yells and crookedly plants on the ground.
I followed her gaze to see Edward, smiling crookedly, staring at me from an empty table across the cafeteria from where he usually sat.
His thin and very long neck hung crookedly on his shoulder, as if out of joint.
Opening his laptop, he displays a video of one of his projectiles taking off, albeit crookedly, with a plume of white smoke.
